Static.Name: PolarityLabel
Static.Help: 显示和设置当前调谐文件的极性

NonEditCombobox.Name: Polarity
NonEditCombobox.Help: 显示和设置当前调谐文件的极性

Static.Name: TuneIonModeLabel
Static.Help: 显示调谐文件需要的电离模式

NonEditCombobox.Name: TuneIonMode
NonEditCombobox.Help: 显示和设置当前调谐文件的离子源模式
NonEditCombobox.CmdList: MSTN_ChangeIMode API_ES | MSTN_ChangeIMode APCI | MSTN_ChangeIMode APPI | MSTN_ChangeIMode "MM-ES+APCI" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "MM-ES" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "MM-APCI" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "NANOESI" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "CHIPCUBE" | MSTN_ChangeIMode "AJS-ES"

Static.Name: InstIonModeLabel
Static.Help: 显示从 MSD 读取的实际电离模式

StatusList.Name: InstIonMode
StatusList.Help: "显示从 MSD 读取的实际电离模式"

Static.Name: CalLabel
Static.Help: 选择要发送到处于 MSOn 状态的 MSD 的调谐液设置

NonEditCombobox.Name: CalMode
NonEditCombobox.Help: 选择是否在下次 MSOn 状态时激活调谐液

Static.Name: ScanLabel
Static.Help: 选择要发送到处于 MSOn 状态的 MSD 的调谐液设置

NonEditCombobox.Name: ScanMode
NonEditCombobox.Help: 显示和设置当前调谐文件的扫描模
